parents.subject: LU-14171 ldlm: fix wrong lock in __ldlm_del_waiting_lock

commit.subject: LU-14541 tests: shorten sanityn/109 duration
commit.message:
LU-14541 tests: shorten sanityn/109 duration

This test is run frequently enough that the race conditions
would be hit if longer testing was the answer.  Instead, we get enough
iterations across test sessions that we can reduce the iterations for
individual test sessions during regular testing.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Change-Id: Ie08002e35b1f0d0bc28ce91eefd652302cda71dc
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/64776
Reviewed-by: Etienne AUJAMES <eaujames@ddn.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
